description: Hallo ihr Lieben, Ich bin Charan Amrit Kaur und habe vor 6 Jahren begonnen meine große Leidenschaft zu teilen: das Kundalini Yoga, Meditation und auch die Sat Nam Rasayan Heilung. Ich bin zertifizierte Yoga-Lehrerin, Heilerin und Rohkostchefin. Das erste Mal habe ich tatsächlich vor 20 Jahren Kundalini Yoga praktiziert und es war Liebe auf den ersten Blick. Die Wirkung auf Körper, Geist und Seele ist unbeschreiblich. Nach einer Stunde fühlt man sich geklärt, ruhig, gelassen und mit seiner Seele verbunden. Die Praxis hat mein Leben so bereichert und meine Entwicklung in allen Bereichen gefördert. Meine Mission ist es die Werkzeuge und die Praxis mit möglichst vielen Menschen zu teilen. Es ist wunderbar für alle Yoga-Anfänger, wie auch für Fortgeschrittene. Tiefe Heilung wird möglich und somit auch wahre Potentialsentfaltung. Viel Freude auf meinem Kanal! Mehr Infos zur Live Praxis findest du hier: www.charan-amrit-kaur.de/yoga-tribe/ Sat Nam!

description: Welcome to yoga with MASTER D! we want to share our yoga knowledge with all yoga students and help many people who want to learn yoga through our high-quality videos. All the level from basic to advance or those who want to be a yoga teacher all are welcome. If you are new to yoga its perfect opportunity for you to learn from basics to advance with complete details. You can find the 30 min of universal yoga sequence and start your practice all the asana will explained one by one in future videos which will help you to understand the asana and will help you to practice safely and develop quickly through your yoga journey. If you are already practicing and suffering with some advance pose like hand stand so stay in tune and comment me what you are suffering with. All I need your love and support and your pretty happy face throughout practice. Sending love and light MASTER – D E- RYT 500, MASTER IN YOGA RISHIKESH YOGKULAM, RISHIKESH, INDIA www.rishikeshyogkulam.com

description: Welcome to the official YouTube channel of Siva Siddhi Kundalini Yoga Foundation. Founded by Siddha Yogi Sri Nageswara Maharshi, the organization offers initiation into kundalini meditation and shares the profound spiritual knowledge on how to lead a peaceful and successful life, attain perfection of mind and moksha (self-realization). The organization has been guiding thousands of people since 1995. Sudhamayi amma, a devoted disciple of Nageswara Maharshi, a former gynecologist, dedicated her life to spiritual service for over 30 years, has taken up the responsibility of this divine mission. description: Welcome to Satya Yoga Ashram, a sanctuary for holistic wellness and spiritual growth nestled in the serene landscapes of Rishikesh. Led by Satya, our traditional yoga school offers comprehensive 100hr, 200hr, 300hr Yoga Teacher Training programs in French & English in Rishikesh, India, France & Sri Lanka. We cover Hatha Yoga, Kundalini Yoga, and Mantra Yoga, certified by Yoga Alliance. Immerse yourself in yoga philosophy and practice under experienced instructors. Our courses prepare you to become a certified yoga teacher, while our wellness retreats offer rejuvenation and holistic well-being. Escape the routine and embark on a transformative journey at Satya Yoga Ashram. Join us in promoting wellness, harmony, and spiritual awakening through yoga's ancient wisdom. 🔸 🔸 🔸 🔸 www.satyayogaashram.com
